# Create a blog-post about neo.mjs

The requirement to add a new page to Wikipedia is, that there is at least **one** external reference out there in the wild.

So far the literally only one writing about neo.mjs is me, so these articles do not count as external.

It would be highly appreciated if someone can jump in to make the Wikipedia entry happen!
